name: Reachability
description: Must-see beats (plot keystones, required items) are reachable from at least one path without paradoxes. Gateway keys are obtainable.

rubric.instructions: Evaluate whether critical content is reachable. Identify keystones and verify at least one viable path exists to each.

criteria.name: keystone_reachability
criteria.description: All must-see beats and plot keystones can be reached via at least one viable path.

good: Multiple paths lead to the critical revelation
Key item can be obtained through several routes
bad: Critical plot point is behind an impossible gate
No valid path exists to required content

criteria.name: gateway_key_obtainability
criteria.description: If a gateway is required, at least one route exists to obtain its condition.

good: The foreman's token can be earned through dialogue or bribery
Multiple ways to satisfy gate condition
bad: Gate requires item that cannot be obtained

criteria.name: dependency_chain_reasonability
criteria.description: Chains of dependencies are not unrealistically deep or complex.

bad: Requires 10 specific actions in exact order

failure_guidance: Add an alternative path to locked content or remove the lock. Reduce dependency depth by providing a second route. Ensure at least one path to every gateway key exists.
